@@ -66,7 +66,7 @@

       "rebuilding": false,
@@ -155,7 +155,51 @@
       "hnsw_path": null,
       "hnsw_ready": false,
       "progressive_ready": false,
-      "hint": "Run 'cass index --full' first. Optional later: run 'cass models install' and 'cass index --semantic', or keep using --mode lexical."
+      "hint": "Run 'cass index --full' first. Optional later: run 'cass models install' and 'cass index --semantic', or keep using --mode lexical.",

+        "present": false,

     "_meta": {
       "timestamp": "[TIMESTAMP]",

@@ -528,14 +528,14 @@
         },
         {
           "name": "since",
-          "description": "Filter to entries since ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS)",
+          "description": "Filter to entries since ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS), keyword (`today`, `yesterday`, `now`), or relative offset (`-7d`, `-24h`, `-30m`, `-1w`). `allow_hyphen_values` lets the dash-prefixed forms pass clap without requiring the equals syntax (reality-check bead hr0z4)",
           "arg_type": "option",
           "value_type": "string",
           "required": false
         },
         {
           "name": "until",
-          "description": "Filter to entries until ISO date",
+          "description": "Filter to entries until ISO date / keyword / relative offset",
           "arg_type": "option",
           "value_type": "string",
           "required": false
@@ -806,6 +806,17 @@
             "false"
           ]
         },
+        {
+          "name": "quarantine",
+          "description": "Include quarantine and retained-asset inspection details",
+          "arg_type": "flag",
+          "required": false,
+          "default": "false",
+          "enum_values": [
+            "true",
+            "false"
+          ]
+        },
         {
           "name": "verbose",
           "short": "v",
@@ -1716,14 +1727,14 @@
       "arguments": [
         {
           "name": "since",
-          "description": "Start time (ISO date, 'today', 'yesterday', 'Nd' for N days ago)",
+          "description": "Start time (ISO date, 'today', 'yesterday', 'Nd' for N days ago, or relative `-7d`/`-24h`/`-30m`/`-1w`). `allow_hyphen_values` lets dash-prefixed offsets pass clap (reality-check bead hr0z4)",
           "arg_type": "option",
           "value_type": "string",
           "required": false
         },
         {
           "name": "until",
-          "description": "End time (ISO date or relative)",
+          "description": "End time (ISO date, keyword, or relative offset)",
           "arg_type": "option",
           "value_type": "string",
           "required": false

           "value_type": "string",
           "required": false
         },
